/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libgo2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libgo2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/go2_interface/msg/detail/camera_gimbal_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/go2_interface/srv/detail/camera_mode__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_modes__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_light__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/go2_interface__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/go2_interface/srv/detail/go2_volume__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/foxy/lib: /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
